title: Pakistan steps up crypto enforcement with dedicated federal unit
summary: A senior official with Pakistan’s Federal Investigation Agency reportedly recommended other agencies establish similar units to address crypto-related crime.

title: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
summary: Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the messaging platform will roll out a native non-custodial Gram wallet this summer, bringing self-custody crypto transactions to its more than 1 billion users.

title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid a rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

title: US Yields Hit Two-Month High as Oil Sparks Inflation Risk
summary: US Treasuries fell, pushing 10- and 30-year yields to the highest in about two months, as a surge in oil prices stoked concern that inflationary pressures will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: White House Presses Senate Democrats To Accept Trump Ethics Deal On Clarity Act

White House Presses Senate Democrats To Accept Trump Ethics Deal On Clarity Act
White House officials are urging Senate Democrats to accept President Trump's ethics deal on the Clarity Act, with negotiations entering the final stretch before Congress' August recess.

title: Google Ships New Gemini Flash Models, But Pro Is Still Missing
summary: As Gemini 3.5 Pro stalls in testing limbo, Google ships 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and a restricted cybersecurity model—and quietly teases Gemini 4.

title: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
summary: The Tiger Global-led round values the startup at $1 billion as it wires stablecoin rails directly into a federally chartered bank, aiming to modernize the correspondent-banking plumbing behind cross-border payments.

title: Satsuma shareholders approve bitcoin treasury liquidation and London delisting
summary: The vote comes less than a year after UK-based Satsuma Technology raised $218 million to pursue its bitcoin strategy.

title: Congress weighs its role as fight over sports betting prediction market oversight forges on
summary: As state and federal regulators continue to clash over who should oversee sports-related prediction markets, lawmakers consider stepping in.

title: Zelenskyy replaces top Ukraine general in biggest military shake-up since 2024
summary: President chooses 43-year-old Mykhailo Drapatyi to replace Oleksandr Syrsky in generational shift in Kyiv’s military leadership

title: The Gulf nation that became Iran’s softest target
summary: Kuwait, still scarred by the 1990 Iraqi invasion, has been repeatedly attacked by Tehran and its allies
